title: Piedmontese and Paneer Piadina
description: A delicious Italian-inspired dish featuring the rich flavors of Piedmontese beef and creamy paneer cheese, wrapped in a crispy piadina bread.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Season the Piedmontese beef slices with salt and black pepper.
Grill the beef slices for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Meanwhile, toast the piadina bread slices until crispy and lightly browned.
Slice the grilled beef into thin strips.
Top each toasted piadina slice with a few slices of beef, some peppery arugula, and a slice of paneer cheese.
Drizzle with xtra virgin olive oil and serve immediately.
Optional: add a sprinkle of salt and black pepper to taste.
